name: CZ75自动型 | 聚合物
descriptionEn: A fully automatic variant of the CZ75, the CZ75-Auto is the ideal short-term choice for turning the tables and gaining your opponents weapon. But with very little ammo in the magazine, strong trigger discipline is required. The slide has been given a decal that resembles a polymer formula. You're not dealing with The Phoenix anymore, we know how to take care of our own... - The Daughter and the Paladin Part 2
descriptionZh: 一把全自动的 CZ75 手枪变种，在扭转局势以及获取敌人武器时，CZ75 自动手枪是一个短期的理想选择。但弹夹中的弹药极少，你需要节约每一发子弹。 滑套附上了类似于聚合物配方的贴花。 你不用再对付凤凰战士了，我们知道怎么照看好自己…-《女儿与圣骑士（下）》
